HAPPY stands just outside the door to the apartment. His eyes are red and puffy. As MAY goes to shut the door-HAPPY I just feel so dumb. I didn't realize you were... miserable.

Peter!

The distraction is over. Peter sighs, slumps over, and pulls up the blind TO REVEAL... INSANITY. HELICOPTERS. PEOPLE gathered on the streets and nearby rooftops, calling out Peter's name. May and Happy join Peter at the window. chaos. Mouths agape. Looking out at the

A.k.a Peter Parker! A.k.a. The

- NIGHT ANGLE ON the security monitor of Happy's condo. and quiet, save for-- All is still Peter lies on the couch talking with MJ via FaceTime.

I love them so

I have a weird question. Um... does any part of you feel relieved about all this?

Ever since I got bit by that spider, I've only had one week where my life has felt normal. Or kinda normal, I guess. And... that was when you found out. Because then everyone that was in my life that I wanted to know, knew. And it was perfect. (then) But now everybody knows. And I am the most famous person in the entire world... and I'm still broke.

Yeah, me too.
A tender moment between the two.
Wrap it up!
Peter jumps! Turns to see--

senior year from Midtown High's
